<!-- generated by bootstrap-agents-md v1.1.0 -->

# Architecture

Single Next.js 16 (App Router) app that serves a file-based catalog of Eve agents and extensions — no database, no auth (Phase 1 constraint).

## Core Flow

```
catalog/ (registry.json + agent dirs) -> lib/catalog (fs reads) -> app/(site) routes (RSC) -> components/
                                                          \-> app/api/* (file explorer, composer export, search)
                                                          \-> app/llms.txt, app/agents.md (catalog snapshots)
content/docs/ (MDX) -> fumadocs-mdx (.source) -> lib/source -> app/docs/*
                                                    \-> app/llms.txt, app/llms.mdx (processed Markdown)
lib/site.ts (SITE, NAV_LINKS, AGENT) -> header/footer/docs layout + /agents.md instructions
```

1. **Catalog content** — `catalog/registry.json` indexes agents and extensions; `catalog/agents/<slug>/` holds full agent source; `catalog/extensions/<slug>/` holds extension stubs. This is content, not app code (excluded from `tsconfig.json`).
2. **Data access** — `lib/catalog/index.ts` reads the registry and agent files from disk with `node:fs/promises`; `lib/catalog/types.ts` defines `Registry`, `AgentListing`, `ExtensionListing`, `FileTreeNode`.
3. **Site routes** — server components under `app/(site)/` render browse/detail pages (`/agents`, `/agents/[slug]`, `/extensions`, `/categories/[slug]`, `/integrations/[name]`, `/composer`) with the shared header/footer.
4. **Guides** — Fumadocs MDX in `content/docs/`, configured by `source.config.ts`, loaded via `lib/source.ts`, rendered at `/docs` (`app/docs/`). Ops/agent plans stay in `docs/` and are not a Fumadocs collection.
5. **Machine-readable surfaces** — `/llms.txt` (guides index + catalog listings), `/llms.mdx/[[...slug]]` (per-guide Markdown via `includeProcessedMarkdown`), `/agents.md` (product/instructions from `AGENT` + live catalog). Built in `lib/llms.ts`.
6. **SEO** — `app/sitemap.ts` and `app/robots.ts`; root layout sets `metadataBase` + Open Graph from `lib/site.ts`.
7. **API** — `app/api/agents/[slug]/file/route.ts` serves individual agent files to the file explorer; `app/api/composer/export/route.ts` builds a starter-project zip with JSZip from the composer selection; `app/api/search/route.ts` powers site-wide Orama search (guides + agents + extensions + integrations via `lib/search/indexes.ts`).

## Key Modules

- **`lib/catalog/`** — sole reader of `catalog/`; all registry/file access goes through it, never direct `fs` calls elsewhere
- **`lib/composer/storage.ts`** — composer selection persisted in `localStorage` (`eve-directory-composer` key); client-only, guarded for SSR
- **`lib/site.ts`** — single site config: `SITE`, `NAV_LINKS` / `FOOTER_LINKS`, `AGENT` (for `/agents.md`), origin/GitHub helpers, integration labels
- **`lib/llms.ts`** — builders for `/llms.txt`, `/llms.mdx`, `/agents.md` (Fumadocs `llms()` + `getText("processed")` + catalog)
- **`lib/search/`** — combined search indexes for Fumadocs Orama (`indexes.ts`) + dialog tag labels (`tags.ts`)
- **`lib/docs/related-guides.ts`** — map integration slugs → related `/docs` pages for detail sidebars
- **`lib/catalog/integrations.ts`** — readers for `integrations.json` / `integrations-details.json` (re-exported from `lib/catalog`)
- **`components/`** — shared UI (`site-header`, `listing-card`, `file-explorer`, `composer-workspace`, `ad-slot`, `search-trigger`, `related-guides`); MDX embeds in `components/mdx/`; primitives in `components/ui/` (shadcn Base UI kit + `surface`, styled to Geist materials — see [DESIGN.md](../../DESIGN.md))

## Composer

Client selection (localStorage) → `POST /api/composer/export` with `{ agents, extensions }` slugs → first agent becomes the primary; its files are zipped under `agent/` plus notes → downloadable starter zip. Invariant: at least one agent required.

## Workspace Structure

```
app/            # App Router: (site)/ catalog chrome, docs/ Fumadocs, api/,
                # llms.txt, llms.mdx, agents.md, sitemap.ts, robots.ts
content/docs/   # public guides (MDX + meta.json) for Fumadocs
catalog/        # content: registry.json, agents/<slug>/, extensions/<slug>/
components/     # shared components; components/ui/ primitives; components/mdx.tsx
lib/            # catalog, composer, site config, llms builders, Fumadocs source
docs/           # agent docs (docs/agents/); plans (docs/plans/) are local/gitignored — not site MDX
.agents/skills/ # project skills (symlinked into .claude/skills/)
source.config.ts
```
